====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Rose
|pkmn=Copperajah
|stage1=Cufant
|type1=Steel
|img=Rose Cufant.png
|cap=Rose's Cufant
|img2=Rose Copperajah.png
|cap2=Rose's Copperajah
|epnum=JN044
|epname=Sword and Shield: "From Here to Eternatus!"
|desc={{p|Copperajah}} was first seen as a {{p|Cufant}} during a flashback when Rose was a child. As an adult, Rose used Copperajah, soon joined by his {{p|Ferrothorn}}, to battle {{Ash}}'s {{AP|Pikachu}} and {{p|Riolu}}, but it was eventually defeated by Ash's newly evolved {{AP|Lucario}}.

Copperajah's known moves are {{m|Power Whip}} and {{m|Heavy Slam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Rose
|pkmn=Ferrothorn
|type1=Grass
|type2=Steel
|img=Rose Ferrothorn.png
|cap=Rose's Ferrothorn
|epnum=JN044
|epname=Sword and Shield: "From Here to Eternatus!"
|desc=Rose sent out a {{p|Ferrothorn}} to battle Ash. It teamed up with {{p|Copperajah}} to battle {{AP|Pikachu}} and {{p|Riolu}}, but was defeated after Riolu evolved into {{AP|Lucario}}.

Ferrothorn's known moves are {{m|Iron Defense}} and {{m|Power Whip}}.}}

=====Escaped=====
{{TrainerPoké
|main=Leon's Eternatus
|trainer=Rose
|pkmn=Eternatus
|type1=Poison
|type2=Dragon
|img=Rose Eternatus.png
|epnum=JN012
|epname=Flash of the Titans!
|desc=Rose held this {{p|Eternatus}} in the Energy Plant's reactor, planning to strengthen it with [[Galar particle]]s so it could serve as a source of infinite energy for the Galar region. After a number of experiments in which Galar particles were injected into the reactor, it escaped from its containment field within [[Hammerlocke Stadium]] in ''[[JN044|Sword and Shield: "From Here to Eternatus!"]]''. Above the stadium, Eternatus began gathering massive amounts of energy from across the region. In ''[[JN045|Sword and Shield... The Legends Awaken!]]'', Eternatus transformed into its {{fd|Eternatus|Eternamax}} form, but with {{p|Zacian}} and {{p|Zamazenta}}'s help, {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] managed to defeat and {{pkmn2|caught|catch}} it, allowing it to be sealed away.}}
